signals.headline: XRP Now Live on Solana as Wrapped Token (wXRP) with $100M Liquidity | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Now Live on Solana as Wrapped Token (wXRP) with $100M Liquidity | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP has launched on Solana as wXRP, a 1:1 custody-backed wrapped token via Hex Trust and LayerZero, available on Jupiter, Phantom, Titan Exchange, and Meteora, with over $100 million initial liquidity[3][4][7]. This integration was confirmed around April 17, coinciding with XRP price breaking $1.50 amid

signals.headline: Fed Chair Powell Confirms Trump's Tariffs Are Driving Most of Recent Inflation Overshoot | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell Confirms Trump's Tariffs Are Driving Most of Recent Inflation Overshoot | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stated on December 10, 2025, that inflation for goods has picked up due to tariffs, attributing "most" or "more than half" of the excess inflation above the 2% target to them, following an FOMC interest rate cut.[1][2]
